priority_actions.ai_next_action: Route a potential buyer to the Break-Zero Value Sprint offer: USD 29 starter sprint, USD 99 focused sprint, or USD 249 team/founder sprint.

capital_gate.message: No spend by default. Any cost requires official source, expected value greater than total cost, known max loss, real eligibility, no speculation or gambling, no deposit/new-funds bonus, no sensitive data handled by agents, and a defined stop point.
